variants.name: 半吸血鬼 ¶
variants.ability: 每个夜晚*，你会得知一名死亡角色：你可能被当作该角色直到下个黎明。[+1外来者。离你最远的外来者是邪恶的]
variants.otherNightReminder: Mark a dead player with the *NEW BLOOD* reminder. Show that player's character to the Dhampir.
variants.flavor: Run far from here, tenderfoot. Leave but nothing in thy stead. Zoti të bekoftë, i huaj.
